## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New playbook
- [ ] Tool matrix update
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Project blueprint
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] Change is practical and action-oriented
- [ ] Content is concise and GitHub-readable
- [ ] Links and references are valid
- [ ] New files are discoverable from README or index docs
- [ ] I reviewed CONTRIBUTING.md and CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

## Optional context
Benchmark notes, screenshots, or implementation references.
